sn4.4:1.1: Evaṁ me sutaṁ—​ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā bārāṇasiyaṁ vihārati isipatane migadāye. Tatra kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi: "bhikkhavo"ti.
sn4.4:1.2: "Bhadante"ti te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ. Bhagavā etadavoca:
sn4.4:2.1: "Mayhaṁ kho, bhikkhave, yoniso manasikārā yoniso sammappadhānā anuttarā vimutti anuppattā, anuttarā vimutti sacchikatā. Tumhepi, bhikkhave, yoniso manasikārā yoniso sammappadhānā anuttaraṁ vimuttiṁ anupāpuṇātha, anuttaraṁ vimuttiṁ sacchikarothā"ti.
sn4.4:2.2: Atha kho māro pāpimā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ gāthāya ajjhabhāsi:
sn4.4:5.1: Atha kho māro pāpimā … pe … tatthevantaradhāyīti.
